_meta.structure: Choose two 20-card packets, shuffle into one 40-card deck. Play until 2 wins or 3 losses.
_meta.contentsNote: Packet identity (name, colors, rarity, theme text) and synergy tags are source-backed (Wizards + MTGABuddy). Exact rareCards lists and creature/removal/cardDraw counts are NOT yet imported — the app treats those as unknown and derives ESTIMATES from tags. Import MTGABuddy contents to raise confidence.

packets.name: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.
packets.theme: Attack alone to gain bonuses and infiltrate the enemy.
packets.notes: Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

packets.name: Battalion
packets.theme: Attack with three or more creatures for overwhelming damage.
packets.notes: Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

packets.name: Caretakers
packets.theme: Care for yourself and your allies by gaining life and adding +1/+1 counters.
packets.notes: Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

packets.name: Counterargument
packets.theme: Take the fight to court and dish out +1/+1 counters.
packets.notes: Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

packets.name: Equipped
packets.theme: Use Equipment to lead Cap and company to victory.
packets.notes: Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

buzz.note: Home to Swordsman's Steel, called an 'instant staple' equipment payoff by reviewers.
buzz.source: Card Kingdom / EDHREC editorial buzz (not match data)

packets.notes: Multicolour packet. Combines with anything but adds fixing risk. Card counts and rare list pending MTGABuddy import.

buzz.note: Reed Richards (quadruples card draw) is a highlighted value engine; highest-value mythic packet.
